revision.comment: 1 revision imported: I hope this manages to go through
Bot: redirect unused template to en:
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23455888809|manual triggered pipeline]]
1 revision imported: overwriting to try to fix the lower alpha issue
1 revision imported: overwriting to try to fix the lower alpha issue

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Hatnote_inline here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Hatnote_inline for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
{{#invoke:Hatnote inline|hatnoteInline
 |1={{{1|{{{text|{{{content}}}}}}}}}
 |extraclasses={{{class|{{{extraclasses|}}}}}}
 |selfref={{#if:{{{printworthy|{{{selfref|}}}}}}||yes}}
 |category={{{category|}}}
 |inline={{{inline|true}}}
}}<noinclude>
{{documentation}}
<!-- Categories go on the /doc subpage, and interwikis go on Wikidata. -->
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24938264069|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Hatnote_inline for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
{{#invoke:Hatnote inline|hatnoteInline
 |1={{{1|{{{text|{{{content}}}}}}}}}
 |extraclasses={{{class|{{{extraclasses|}}}}}}
 |selfref={{#if:{{{printworthy|{{{selfref|}}}}}}||yes}}
 |category={{{category|}}}
 |inline={{{inline|true}}}
}}<noinclude>
{{documentation}}

</noinclude>
